## Thank you for submitting your proposal! 🎉

Hi @{author}! Thank you for taking the time to share your learnings with the PyDelhi community! 👋

The PyDelhi volunteer team (@pydelhi/reviewers) has been notified of your submission and will review it as soon as possible. We appreciate your patience during this process.

### What happens next?

1. **Review process**: The team will review your proposal as soon as possible.
2. **Feedback**: Reviewers may reach out to seek clarifications or suggestions to help strengthen your proposal, to ensure it aligns with our guidelines, and to make it more engaging for the audience. Please keep an eye on your notifications!
3. **Confirmation**: Once your proposal is formally accepted, the event logistics will be coordinated with you, including scheduling and any necessary preparations.
4. **Support**: First-time speakers can seek mentorship and practice sessions if needed, subject to the availability of the team. Please let us know!

### Important reminders

- Please make sure you have read and understood the [guidelines](https://github.com/pydelhi/talks/blob/main/guidelines/speaking.md) for submitting proposals and delivering talks, as well as our [accessibility guidelines](https://github.com/pydelhi/talks/blob/main/guidelines/accessibility.md).
- All talks/sessions are licensed under a [Creative Commons Attribution-Non Commercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/), unless you state otherwise in your proposal above. This means that your talk can be shared and adapted for non-commercial purposes, as long as appropriate credit is given and any derivative works are shared under the same license.
- Please follow [PyDelhi's Code of Conduct](https://pydelhi.org/coc.html) and maintain a welcoming, inclusive environment throughout your participation.

### Questions?

Feel free to:
- Join the [PyDelhi WhatsApp community](https://chat.whatsapp.com/IUA2o1Xu8w8LmaZ8bw0nbb)
- Join the [PyDelhi Telegram group](https://t.me/PyDelhi_official)
- Send us an email at [pydelhi.org@gmail.com](mailto:pydelhi.org@gmail.com)
- Write to us in a comment below this message! :)

Thank you again for contributing to the Python community in Delhi! 🐍❤️

---

**Improve this questionnaire:** Did you find a bug, or do you have suggestions? Please feel free to add them as a comment below or [open a separate issue](https://github.com/pydelhi/talks/issues/new?template=BLANK_ISSUE) as you prefer. We welcome contributions to improve this proposal form and the overall process!

*This is an automated message. The review team will be with you shortly!*
